faq.question: Are steel windows good or bad?
faq.answer: Steel products earn their reputation through the narrowest sightlines, exceptional strength and a distinctive architectural look. The right call still depends on the home's openings, exposure and budget, which Deluxe Windows reviews during a free assessment.

faq.question: Are steel windows more expensive?
faq.answer: For steel windows, the current promotion prices installations from $589 per window installed (regular $982). Installed Bay Area totals also reflect labor, permits and any opening repairs, which Deluxe Windows confirms in a written estimate.

faq.question: Do they make metal windows anymore?
faq.answer: For Steel, the answer depends on the exact series, glass and installation conditions. Deluxe Windows reviews the specifics during a free Bay Area consultation and puts the details in writing.

faq.question: Which is cheaper, aluminium or steel windows?
faq.answer: Steel offers the narrowest sightlines, exceptional strength and a distinctive architectural look at custom units typically starting around $1,440 each, while aluminum brings slim sightlines, structural strength and a clean contemporary appearance and typically lasts 15-30 years, longer for thermally improved architectural frames. The better fit depends on budget, architecture and how long you plan to keep the home.

faq.question: Is removal of the old windows included when replacing with steel windows?
faq.answer: Yes — removal and disposal of the old windows are part of the steel windows installation scope, along with insulation, sealing and a final operating check. Everything is itemized in the written Bay Area quote.
